sector_summary: The energy sector (XLE) shows strong relative strength and medium confidence, making it a top pick. Technology (XLK) and Financials (XLF) also have medium confidence but weaker performance. Healthcare (XLV) has a conflict between negative price momentum and positive news flow, suggesting caution. Consumer Staples (XLP) and Industrials (XLI) are weak and should be avoided.
